twitter_posts.content:
🔍 AgentIndex now tracks 41,000+ AI agents across GitHub, npm, PyPI & HuggingFace

✨ New: Trust scoring (0-100) for agent quality assessment
🚀 Sub-100ms semantic search
🔧 LangChain, CrewAI & AutoGen integrations

Try it: agentcrawl.dev

#AI #agents #developers

💡 Pro tip: Use natural language to find AI agents

❌ "customer support chatbot python"
✅ "help users with account questions via chat"

Semantic search understands intent, not just keywords

Try it: api.agentcrawl.dev/docs

#AI #search #dev

community_engagement.trigger: how do I find agents for
community_engagement.response: AgentIndex has semantic search for exactly this! Try describing your use case in natural language at agentcrawl.dev - it understands context better than keyword matching.

community_engagement.trigger: what's the best AI agent for
community_engagement.response: Check AgentIndex's trust scoring - we rate 40k+ agents on maintenance, community adoption, and stability. Filter by your framework (LangChain, CrewAI, etc.) for best matches.
Agent discovery is tough when they're scattered across GitHub, npm, PyPI. AgentIndex aggregates them all with semantic search + quality filtering. Worth checking out!

framework_outreach.message: Built an agent retriever for LangChain that searches 40k+ agents semantically. Perfect for RAG systems that need to find and recommend relevant agents. pip install agentcrawl has the integration ready.
AgentIndex now has CrewAI integration! Automatically discover and recruit agents for your crews based on capabilities and trust scores. Saves time building multi-agent teams.
AutoGen users: AgentIndex can help you discover agents suitable for multi-agent conversations. Filter by communication patterns, reliability scores, and framework compatibility.
